acceptGovernorship().details: Allows new governor to accept governorship of the contract.

delegate(address).details: Delegate votes from the sender to `delegatee`.

params.delegatee: The address to delegate votes to
params.expiry: The time at which to expire the signature
params.nonce: The contract state required to match the signature
params.r: Half of the ECDSA signature pair
params.s: Half of the ECDSA signature pair
params.v: The recovery byte of the signature

delegates(address).details: Get the address `account` is currently delegating to.

getPastTotalSupply(uint256).details: Retrieve the `totalSupply` at the end of `blockNumber`. Note, this value is the sum of all balances. It is but NOT the sum of all the delegated votes! Requirements: - `blockNumber` must have been already mined

getPastVotes(address,uint256).details: Retrieve the number of votes for `account` at the end of `blockNumber`. Requirements: - `blockNumber` must have been already mined

getVotes(address).details: Gets the current votes balance for `account`

transferGovernorship(address).details: Transfers governorship of the contract to a new account (`proposedGovernor`). Can only be called by the current owner.

transferPosition(uint256,address).details: Revert if caller isn't the esVSP721 contract

params.beforeUnlockTime_: When `true` unlock before expiration and pays exit penalty

ExitPenaltyUpdated(uint256,uint256).notice: Emitted when the exit penalty is updated

TreasuryUpdated(address,address).notice: Emitted when the treasury address is updated

VspLocked(uint256,address,uint256,uint25.notice: Emitted when a new position is created (i.e. when user locks VSP)

VspUnlocked(uint256,uint256,uint256,uint.notice: Emitted when a position is burned due to unlock or kick

balanceOf(address).notice: Get total(locked + boosted) VSP balance of user. This is different than ESVSP721.balanceOf(). It is sum of - total locked VSP:: sum of locked VSP in each ESVSP721 token, position, of user. - total boosted VSP:: sum of boosted amount of VSP in each ESVSP721 token, position, of user.

boosted(address).notice: Total boosted amount by user among all his positions

calculateExitPenalty(uint256).notice: Calculate exit penalty for a position

exitPenalty().notice: Fee paid when withdrawing. Decreases linearly as period finish approaches.

kick(uint256).notice: Burn an expired position and send locked amount to the owner

kickAllExpiredOf(address).notice: Kick all expired positions from a given account

lock(uint256,uint256).notice: Lock VSP to get boosted revenue and voting power. Lock VSP and generate users position by minting ERC721

lockFor(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Lock VSP to get boosted revenue and voting power. Lock VSP and generate users position by minting ERC721

locked(address).notice: Total VSP locked by user among all his positions

nonces(address).notice: A record of states for signing / validating signatures

totalSupply().notice: Total Supply is some of total boosted and total locked

transferPosition(uint256,address).notice: Transfer position (i.e. locked and boosted amounts) between accounts

treasury().notice: The treasury contract (will receive exit penalty collected)

unlock(uint256,bool).notice: Unlock VSP by burning given ERC721 tokenId_
